headline: 1 Profitable Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Avoid
summary: Even if a company is profitable, it doesn’t always mean it’s a great investment. Some struggle to maintain growth, face looming threats, or fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their future potential.

headline: Conagra Vs. Hormel: 2 Beaten‑Down, High‑Yield Food Giants Face Off
summary: Conagra Brands, Inc. and Hormel Foods Corporation are Buy-rated: defensive dividend stocks with protein-focused brands. Click for more on CAG and HRL shares.
